bird.name: Nauru reed warbler
bird.summary: The Nauru reed warbler (Nauruan: itsirir) (Acrocephalus rehsei) is a passerine bird endemic to the island of Nauru in the Pacific Ocean. It…

relations.subject: Nauru reed warbler
relations.evidence: The Nauru reed warbler is potentially threatened by introduced predators and habitat loss, and its small range means that it could be vulnerable to chance occurrences, such as tropical cyclones
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
